creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

After an initial flurry of emails, things have gone remarkably quiet 
on this one.  Maintainer has indiciated that he no longer uses the 
port so I've reverted maintainership to "ports@FreeBSD.org" 

In addition, until some enterprising person comes along and figures 
out how to ELF-ify this, the port has been marked BROKEN_ELF
